professions.title: Quantum Physicist
professions.description: Quantum physicists in the llamaverse study the fundamental behaviour of matter at the sub-atomic level, with particular focus on the Llama Uncertainty Principle — the empirical observation that a llama in motion cannot be precisely localised without disturbing its hay consumption. Research posts are almost exclusively found at the top three universities.
professions.secretPowerAdvantage: Time Whisperer — enables intuition about quantum timeline branching
